commands.name: list-issues
commands.description: Fetch repository issues through PyGithub using GitHub App credentials from local secrets.

commands.name: get-issue
commands.description: Read a GitHub issue through PyGithub using GitHub App credentials from local secrets.

commands.name: comment-issue
commands.description: Create a GitHub issue comment through PyGithub using GitHub App credentials from local secrets.

commands.name: update-issue-body
commands.description: Update a GitHub issue title/body through PyGithub using GitHub App credentials from local secrets.

commands.name: resolve-github-defaults
commands.description: Resolve and cache the default GitHub assignee/project metadata used when creating issues.

commands.name: create-issue
commands.description: Create GitHub issues with the default assignee and project, using cached metadata when available.

commands.name: create-pr
commands.description: Create pull requests through PyGithub using GitHub App credentials from local secrets.

commands.name: register-issue-branch
commands.description: Record the issue work branch in a standardized GitHub issue comment through PyGithub.

commands.name: project-field
commands.description: Ensure and update GitHub Project number fields for Issues or Pull Requests.

commands.name: set-project-number-field
commands.description: Ensure and update GitHub Project number fields for Issues or Pull Requests.
